name: Wheels Fargo
recent_news: No web presence found; not located in directories of AZ school bus contractors. Likely very small NEMT/paratransit micro-operator; no school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (7 employees, ~$527K revenue, PO box address) with no confirmed school-district business or web footprint. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target absent further confirmation.

name: Lucy Transport LLC
recent_news: Operates as a Virginia NEMT provider (Lucy Transport LLC / related Lucy Transportation Inc). FMCSA-registered carrier (USDOT 3833136). Website lucytransportationgov.com currently down for maintenance. No evidence of school-bus / SPED district contracts.
fit_notes: NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Sub-scale (~$525K rev, 7 employees). Outside Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in profile; not a fit.

name: Comfort Transit Svc
recent_news: Operates as Comfort Transit Services Inc., Monterey Park CA. D&B/ZoomInfo list 5-9 employees and <$500K revenue in rail/bus/taxi industry. No confirmed school-district contracts and no company website.
fit_notes: Micro paratransit/NEMT shop in LA basin; no evidence of yellow-bus or SPED district routes. Sub-scale and likely not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Keegan Enterpises
recent_news: Owner Cynthia Keegan operated Cross Roads Trolley/Keegan Enterprises as a medical transport firm; indicted 2013 and sentenced (per WBJ) to 18 months and $477,658 restitution after pleading guilty to 12+ counts of fraud/larceny for billing MassHealth for fake rides including under names of deceased patients. Not a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFY. Defunct MassHealth NEMT fraud case, not a school-bus operator. Reputational/legal toxicity; absolutely not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Air Libore Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web presence located under this name in Canton OH; not found in Stark County school-bus contractor lists or Ohio limo directories. Likely a micro livery operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: 3-employee livery service; name implies limo not yellow-bus. No school district business identified. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
